bot13.name: BOT13
bot13.tagline: Daily intraday bot. Buys at open, sells before close. Skips the day if no edge.

current_strategy.rationale: Deployed into 5 high-conviction names (SPOT +6.11%, VST +4.82%, BIRK +4.31%, ACHR +3.92%, ALAB +3.04%). Market breadth: 26/55 green. Weighted by signal strength. Stop -1.5% | Target +3.0%.

oracle.name: ORACLE
oracle.tagline: Weekly bot. Trades every Monday. All-in on the week's best bets.

current_strategy.rationale: Top 5 names by composite momentum. Score-weighted (not equal weight). Sector cap enforced (max 2 per sector). Quality gate: 20d momentum positive required.

wizard.name: WIZARD
wizard.tagline: Monthly hold bot. Buys the 1st trading day, sells the last. Slow and patient.

current_strategy.rationale: Top 8 quality compounders for the month. Quartile-weighted (top names get largest allocation). 60d quality filter applied — no negative long-term trends. Sector cap 35%. Stop flag at -12% intra-month.

equalizer.name: EQUALIZER
equalizer.tagline: Equal weight. No favorites. $1,000 in every stock.

titan.name: TITAN
titan.tagline: Half on the heavyweights. Half on the rest. Concentration meets coverage.
